problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Combining Spintronics for low-power data storage with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
